name: signalpilot-dbt
description: Governed AI database access for dbt and SQL — sandboxed queries, schema discovery, and intelligent model building powered by SignalPilot

signalpilot_url.description: SignalPilot server URL (e.g. http://localhost:8080 for Docker, or https://your-instance.signalpilot.dev)

signalpilot_token.description: API token (optional for local Docker instances)
